title: Auto apply crafter Pattern
description:
This mod adds the ability to auto apply Crafter slot patterns to every Crafter you right click. I have come up with the idea to be able to "automate the clicking you have to do on each Crafter. Hotkey is changable default is 
P
body:
**If using this mod on Servers change the Hotkey so it doesnt conflict with Social Interactions**

I do **NOT** take responsability about any Bans on Servers so check out the Rules on any Server you play on :).
This Mod might have some bugs.
If you do find some message me on Discord: 
```
toasterigel
```
**Just dont only say "hi" Please come to the point directly**
The pattern selector menu can be triggered with P but i recommend changing the hotkey in Minecraft settings to something not in conflict with any other Hotkey when you play on Servers.
